name: alert
description:
A contextual message banner (info/success/warning/destructive) whose variant drives the ARIA live-region role by intent (info/success → role=status polite; warning/destructive → role=alert assertive) and the token-pair (surface tint + foreground + border). Static presentational (PARTIAL): no JS, no client state. Slots: icon (boolean, default true, overridable via iconName), title (String heading as

, not a heading element), content (gg.jte.Content body), action (optional inline action below the body), dismiss button when closable=true (a real
docs:
Copies the alert family to your JTE root (lievit/alert.jte + lievit/alert/{title,description,action}.jte), reached as @template.lievit.alert(variant=..., content=@`...`). The variant param (info|success|warning|destructive) determines the ARIA live-region role by intent (info/success → role=status/polite; warning/destructive → role=alert/assertive) and the colour token pair. Pass icon=true (default) to show the variant-default Lucide icon, or iconName="" to override it; icon=false suppresses the icon entirely. Set title="..." (String, renders as

) for an optional heading; the content slot carries the description below it. Set closable=true to render a dismiss
